title: Import Leads (CSV)
invariants_acknowledged: Never mock or simulate data — importer maps to the real lead.create path; no fabricated values.
No bulk-create endpoint exists; per-row api.lead.create is the create path (lead.router.ts:478).
createLeadSchema (validators/lead.ts:41) is the single validation source — client mirrors it, server re-validates.
Client sends RAW string payload; server runs the input-schema transforms (phone->PhoneNumber VO etc.).
CSV formula injection (cells starting = + - @ TAB CR) must be neutralised; free-text fields prefixed with quote.
email/phone are NOT blanket-sanitised (+ is valid in phones); malicious payloads fail schema validation and are surfaced.
Row cap (MAX_IMPORT_ROWS=1000) rejects whole file — never silently truncate.
Every row validated; invalid rows surfaced with reasons, never silently dropped.
Static route /leads/import must be added to the WCAG conformance statement (a11y-routes runs VALIDATION_STRICT=1).
Reachability: (list) layout gives the sidebar; lead-list PageHeader gets an Import CTA.
App page.tsx is diff-coverage-excluded (PG-061 parity); the lib + component carry >=80% new coverage.
Export-path CSV injection in lib/export/csv.ts is a red flag — file an issue, fix rides its own PR (not PG-063).
No Co-Authored-By trailer; no --no-verify; no destructive git; pre-ship is the gate.
